subject: Leon — Galar Champion trainer, identified by card name; figure in a large purple cap and flowing purple cape striking a champion's pose in a lit stadium
description: A trainer stands in a stadium arena with visible arena lighting and a crowd suggested in the background. The figure wears a large, wide-brimmed purple cap, a white and purple short outfit, and a dramatically long flowing purple cape that billows behind them. The figure has clearly visible dark skin. One arm is raised in a triumphant, performative gesture — a champion's entrance pose. The stadium environment features warm pink and yellow arena lighting. The mood is celebratory and competitive. No weapon or prop is visible in the raised hand.
foreground: Trainer in white and purple short outfit with large flowing purple cape and wide-brimmed purple cap, one arm raised in a champion's pose
background: Stadium arena with crowd and warm arena lighting in pink and yellow tones
emotion: confident, triumphant, theatrical — arm raised in champion's pose
